harnesses.name: libreoffice
harnesses.help_preview:
Usage: cli-anything-libreoffice [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

  LibreOffice CLI -- Stateful document editing from the command line.

  Run without a subcommand to enter interactive REPL mode.

Options:
  --json          Output as JSON
  --project TEXT  Path to .lo-cli.json project file
  --help

harnesses.name: mermaid
harnesses.version:
Usage: cli-anything-mermaid [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
Try 'cli-anything-mermaid --help' for help.
harnesses.help_preview:
Usage: cli-anything-mermaid [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

  CLI harness for Mermaid Live Editor state files and renderer URLs.

Options:
  --json          Emit machine-readable JSON
  --project TEXT  Open a Mermaid project file
  --help          Show this message and exit.

Commands:
  diagram  Diagr
